summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EPIC 7-C: Chart of Accounts + General Ledger. All backend endpoints (52/52 tests) and frontend flows passed successfully. Finance module is fully functional with proper RBAC.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/gl/accounts returns 35 accounts with 5 types (asset/liability/equity/income/expense)
Backend: Normal balance correctly derived (asset/expense=debit, liability/equity/income=credit)
Backend: Postable flags correct (header accounts non-postable, detail accounts postable)
Backend: POST /api/gl/accounts creates custom account with correct normal_balance
Backend: Duplicate account code returns 400
Backend: DELETE system account returns 400
Backend: DELETE custom unused account returns 200
Backend: POST /api/gl/sync auto-posts journals (20 journals from 8 sales_orders + 12 cash_transactions)
Backend: Second sync returns total=0 (idempotent)
Backend: GET /api/gl/trial-balance returns balanced result (debit == credit)
Backend: Trial balance shows correct account balances (Piutang debit, Pendapatan credit)
Backend: POST /api/gl/journal creates balanced manual entry (200)
Backend: Unbalanced journal entry returns 400
Backend: Journal to header (non-postable) account returns 400
Backend: Journal has number starting with JE- and correct totals
Backend: POST /api/gl/journal/{id}/void voids manual entry successfully
Backend: Voiding auto journal returns 400
Backend: GET /api/gl/accounts/{code}/ledger returns lines with running_balance
Backend: Ledger balance matches trial balance
Backend: Manager has access to all GL endpoints (200)
Backend: Sales role gets 403 on /api/gl/accounts
Backend: Sales role gets 403 on /api/gl/trial-balance
Backend: Sales role gets 403 on POST /api/gl/journal
Backend: Warehouse role gets 403 on /api/gl/accounts
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: KEUANGAN navigation group visible and clickable
Frontend: Chart of Accounts menu accessible
Frontend: Chart of Accounts view loads with data-testid=coa-view
Frontend: Page title displays 'Bagan Akun (Chart of Accounts)'
Frontend: Total accounts KPI shows 35
Frontend: 5 account type groups displayed (asset, liability, equity, income, expense)
Frontend: 35 account rows visible
Frontend: Add account form opens and closes correctly
Frontend: Jurnal / Buku Besar menu accessible
Frontend: General Ledger view loads with data-testid=gl-view
Frontend: GL KPIs display correctly (20 journals, Rp 219.683.000 debit/credit, Seimbang)
Frontend: Journal tab shows 21 journal entries
Frontend: Journal detail modal opens and closes
Frontend: New Journal Entry modal opens with balance indicator
Frontend: Trial Balance tab switches correctly
Frontend: Trial Balance table loads with 9 rows
Frontend: Trial Balance totals match (Rp 219.683.000 debit/credit)
Frontend: Ledger tab switches correctly
Frontend: Ledger view shows prompt when no account selected
Frontend: RBAC - Sales role cannot see KEUANGAN menu (403 enforcement)
